SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAY, ARTHUR N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHANDI, KAVOOS $4,376.78 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,496.78, THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 414
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-01-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2011 BY JPT ELLIOTT MYLES. (414).
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY GHANDI, KAVOOS JAY, ARTHUR N.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2011 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH THE APPELLANT AND THE RESPONDENT. JPT ELLIOTT MYLES. CLERK: A. PASCUAL. NOT REPORTED. (414). EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT GHANDI, KAVOOS TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT JAY, ARTHUR N. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED DEFENDANT AGREED TO RELEASE HIM FROM HIS OBLIGATION TO REPAINT & TO RELEASE HIM FROM HIS OBLIGATION TO PAY THE LAST TWO MONTHS OF RENT UNDER THE LEASE. DEFENDANT TESTIFIED THAT SHE AGREED TO REFUND PLAINTIFF'S PAYMENT OF FRACTIONAL RENT FOR FEBRUARY, AND PLAINTIFF RELEIVED AND DEPOSITED THE PAYMENT. DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT SHE MADE THESE THREE PROMISES (RELEASE FROM PAINTING; REFUND OF RENT; AND WAIVER OF RENT) IN CONSIDERATION OF ALLOWING PLAINTIFF (SEE JUDGMENT). SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
